Lawyer s Recognition Decision
Decision d accreditation d avocat

We You Bunleng and Marcel Lemonde the Co Investigating Judges of the Extraordinary

Chambers in the Courts of Cambodia

Noting the Law on the establishment of the Extraordinary Chambers dated 27 October 2004
Noting Rule 22 of the Internal Rules of the Extraordinary Chambers

Noting the judicial investigation initiated against
Last Name KHIEU

First Name Samphan

Alias Hem

Sex male
Bora on 27 July 1931 at Commune of Rom Chek District of Rom Duol Province of Svay Rieng
Cambodia
Nationality Cambodian

Noting the designation by the Defense Support Section on request of the above mentioned person of
Mr Jacques VERGES as his Co lawyer dated 08 January 2008

1 We accredite and recognise Mr Jacques VERGES as the Co lawyer of the above mentioned person
for a provisional period until 31 January 2008

2 This lawyer is authorised to assist his client to freely communicated with him and to participate in
any investigative action

Dated the 09th day of January 2008 in Phnom Penh
